prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次约277→381→414→583→278，2024年因扩招位次后移至583，2025年因改为新高考历史类且计划大幅增加至37人，位次显著回升至2 78，接近2021年水平；本省文科计划2021–2023年均为22人，2024年增至26人，2025年历史类大幅增至37人；2026年历史类计划46人，较2025年再扩招24. 3%，连续三年大幅扩招。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第56名，近年排名稳定，属全国顶尖政法类高校；抖音热度总排名第6（ 高热），综合热度约975万，短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要为2016年校园安全旧闻），对当前报考心理影响有限；法学A+（全国唯一法学A+高校），对文科高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业2024年社会热度为分化观望，整体仍偏热；本省2026年历史类考生估算约15.9万人，较2025年历史类11.2万人大幅增加约41%，竞争显著加剧；学校位于北京，对西南省份文科考生有较强地域吸引力；2026年历史类计划46人，为近年最高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次278名、2026年历史类大幅扩招24.3%、本 省历史类考生大幅增加约41%以及抖音高热带来的关注度上升，预计2026年文科最低位次在319名基础上进一步小幅后移；预测最低位次约339名，区间278–400名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间278–400名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档法学各类实验班冲刺、三档行政管理/应用心理学保底；位次明显优于区间下限（278名以内）可重点冲击法学王牌专 业及各类实验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 277 → 381 → 414 → 583 → 278. In 2024, due to enrollment expansion, the ranking moved back to 583. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination history category and a significant increase in planned enrollment to 37 students, the ranking significantly recovered to 278, close to the 2021 level. The provincial liberal arts plan was 22 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 26 in 2024, and significantly increased to 37 in 2025 for the history category. In 2026, the history category plan is 46 students, a further 24.3% expansion compared to 2025, marking three consecutive years of significant enrollment expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top national political science and law universities; Douyin heat total ranking 6th (high heat), comprehensive heat approximately 9.75 million, extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly due to 2016 campus safety old news), with limited impact on current application psychology; Law A+ (the only university with A+ in law nationwide), extremely attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social heat of the law major was divided and wait-and-see, but overall still relatively hot; the estimated number of history category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 159,000, a significant increase of about 41% compared to 112,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for liberal arts candidates from southwestern provinces; the 2026 history category plan is 46 students, the highest in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 278, the 2026 history category significant enrollment expansion of 24.3%, the provincial history category candidate increase of about 41%, and the increased attention from Douyin high heat, it is expected that the 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking will further slightly move back from 319; the predicted minimum ranking is about 339, with a range of 278–400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 278–400, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 law and various experimental classes as a stretch, and use Tier 3 administrative management/applied psychology as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 278), you can focus on impacting the flagship law major and various experimental classes.
